_comment: Synthetic Claude vision verdicts for KRDU candidates that have no Solar coverage. Only used when Solar returned null/unknown. Real vision verdicts in live mode are derived from Google Static Maps satellite tiles passed to claude-3-5-sonnet.

fixture_krdu_014.confidence_note: Single-story commercial building, clearly flat roof in tile.

fixture_krdu_020.confidence_note: Partial flat section over service bays, pitched section over office area.
